ui.title: Bitcoin don Yara
ui.subtitle: Gano duniyar kudi, daraja, da Bitcoin!
ui.newPlayerConfirm: Fara dan wasa sabo? Ci gaban yanzu zai gushe.
ui.footer: An gina shi bisa Bitcoin don Yara na My First Bitcoin · CC BY-SA 4.0

sort.instruction: Ja daga mai araha zuwa mai tsada

categorize.instruction: Ja zuwa nau'i da ya dace
categorize.remaining: Har yanzu {count} ya rage — ina wannan ya kamata?

cipher.instruction: Karya lambar sirri da farantin lambobi

mining.instruction: Nemo nau'i-nau'i masu kama da juna
mining.done: An kammala toshe a cikin {moves} yunƙuri!

modules.title: Musanya, Daraja & Farashi
modules.summary: Daraja ya dogara da abin da kake bukata. Farashi shine nawa abu ya kai. Kudi yana warware matsalar musanya.
modules.description: Gano dalilin da yasa muke amfani da kudi da kuma ainihin darajar abubuwa!

activities.title: Rayuwa a Tsibiri
activities.intro: Jirgin ruwan ka ya nutse kuma ka zo wani tsibiri maras zama!

questions.q: Ka isa wani tsibiri marar zama. Mene ne mafi daraja?
questions.explanation: A tsibiri, da wuka za ka iya yanke itace, yanke abinci, kuma gina mafaka. Kudi da lu'u-lu'u ba su da amfani a can!

questions.q: Kana da sanduna 5 na kamun kifi amma ba ka da tanti. Maƙwabcinka yana da tanti 3 amma ba shi da sanda. Me za ku yi?
options: Musanya: sanda ɗaya don tanti ɗaya!
questions.explanation: Musanya ita ce tsohuwar hanyar ciniki! Ka ba da abin da ka wuce bukatarka don abin da kake bukata.

questions.q: Me yasa musanya wani lokaci yana da wahala?
options: Domin dole ka sami mutumin da yake son daidai abin da kake da shi
questions.explanation: Ana kiransa 'saduwar bukata'. Kudi yana warware wannan matsala — kowa yana karɓar kudi!

questions.q: A da ana amfani da harsashi a matsayin kudi. Menene abin da ke sa wani abu zama kudi mai kyau?
options: Dole ya zama da ƙaranci, mai ɗaukarwa, kuma kowa ya yarda da shi
questions.explanation: Kudi mai kyau yana da ƙaranci (ba a samu shi yadda ake so), ana iya ɗauke shi cikin sauƙi, kuma kowa yana karɓa shi a matsayin biyan kuɗi.

questions.q: Kwalbar ruwa tana farashi ₦200 a kantin sayarwa. A hamada, wani yana ba ka ₦10,000 don wannan kwalbar. Me yasa?
options: Domin ruwa a hamada yana da ƙaranci ƙwarai kuma yana da muhimmanci sosai
questions.explanation: Ƙaranci yana canza daraja! Ƙarancin abu da kuma yadda kake bukata shi, haka darajansa take ƙaruwa.

questions.q: Menene bambanci tsakanin farashi da daraja?
options: Farashi shine nawa abu ya kai, daraja shine muhimmancin abu gare ka
Daraja na game da kudi kawai
questions.explanation: Zanen ɗanko ɗanka mai yiwuwa ba shi da farashi amma yana da daraja matuƙa. Farashi da daraja ba ɗaya ba ne!

activities.title: Layin Farashi
activities.intro: Ka shirya kayayyaki daidai daga mafi araha zuwa mafi tsada!

modules.title: Lokaci, Makamashi & Lada
modules.summary: Makamashi yana da iyaka. Daidaituwa tsakanin aiki, hutawa, da wasa yana da muhimmanci. Haƙuri yana kawo sakamako mafi kyau.
modules.description: Ta yaya kake amfani da lokacinmu da makamashinku? Kuma me yasa jira wani lokaci yana da hankali?

activities.title: Aiki, Hutawa ko Wasa?
activities.intro: Ja kowane aiki zuwa nau'i da ya dace!

activities.title: Zaɓin Lokaci
activities.intro: Ka zaɓi YANZU ko DAGA BAYA?

questions.q: A labarin Ƴaƴan aladu uku: wane gida ya tsaya tsayin daka?
options: 🧱 Na tubali (ya ɗauki mafi yawan lokaci)
questions.explanation: Gidan tubali ya ɗauki mafi yawan lokaci da ƙoƙari, amma shi kaɗai ya tsaya tsayin daka. Haƙuri yana lada!

questions.q: Menene ma'anar 'ƙarancin son lokaci yanzu'?
options: Kana shirye ka jira don wani abu mafi kyau
questions.explanation: Ƙarancin son lokaci yanzu = shirye ka jira don sakamako mafi kyau. Kamar ɗan alade da ya gina gidan tubali!

questions.q: Za a ba ka alewa 1 yanzu, ko alewa 3 idan ka jira mintuna 10. Mene ne zaɓin mafi hankali?
options: Alewa ba shi da kyau ga lafiya
questions.explanation: Wannan shi ne gwajin alewa na shahara! Yara da suka iya jira sun samu sakamako mafi kyau a makaranta daga baya.

questions.q: Kana da muhimman jarrabawa gobe. Menene ƙarancin son lokaci yanzu?
options: Yin wasa yanzu ka karanta gobe
Karanta yau domin ka yi kyau gobe
questions.explanation: Yin wani abu mai wahala yanzu (karatu) domin samun wani abu mai kyau daga baya (maki mai kyau) — wannan ƙarancin son lokaci yanzu ne.

questions.q: Me zai faru idan ka kashe duk makamashinku da safe?
options: Ba ka da komai don sauran rana
questions.explanation: Makamashi yana da iyaka! Raba shi da hankali yana da muhimmanci — kamar kudi.

modules.title: Na Gargajiya da na Zamani
modules.summary: Fasaha tana canzawa koyaushe. Kowane ƙirƙiro yana warware matsala. Ba duk sabon abu ne mafi kyau ba ta atomatik.
modules.description: Daga tattabarar wasiƙa zuwa intanet — yadda fasaha take canza duniya!

activities.title: Tsoho ↔ Sabo
activities.intro: Haɗa kowane tsohon fasaha da sigar zamani!

activities.title: Yi Tunani game da Gaba
activities.intro: Yaya fasaha za ta kasance bayan shekaru 20?

questions.q: Me yasa fasaha take canzawa a tsawon lokaci?
options: Domin mutane suna warware matsaloli da sabbin ƙirƙirori
Ba tare da wata dalilin ba
questions.explanation: Kowane ƙirƙiro yana warware matsala. Mota ta warware matsalar cewa dawakai suna jin gajiya kuma suna tafiya a hankali!

questions.q: Shin sabbin fasahohi KOYAUSHE suna mafi kyau fiye da na tsofaffi?
options: A'a, wani lokaci tsohon abu ya fi kyau ko amincewa
Sabbin fasahohi ba su wanzu ba
questions.explanation: Littafi na takarda ba ya buƙatar batir! Wani lokaci tsofaffin hanyoyin warware matsala har yanzu suna da hankali.

questions.q: Bitcoin kuɗi ne na dijital. Menene ya haɗa shi da tsohuwar harsashi?
options: Dukkansu suna da ƙaranci ana amfani da su a matsayin hanyar musanya
questions.explanation: Harsashi da Bitcoin dukkansu suna da ƙaranci (akwai adadi iyakacin) kuma ana amfani da su a matsayin hanyar musanya.

questions.q: Menene ƙirƙiro?
options: Wani ingantaccen ci gaba ko ƙirƙiro da ke warware matsala
Wani kalma mai wahala da ba ta da ma'ana
questions.explanation: Ƙirƙiro = sabuwar hanya ko mafi kyawun hanya don warware matsalar da ke wanzu. Kowa zai iya ƙirƙiro!

modules.title: Aminci & Sirri
modules.summary: Kai ne ke yanke shawarar bayanan da kake raba. Lambobi na sirri suna kare saƙonni. Ba a buƙatar amana idan kana da ɓoyayyen rubutu.
modules.description: Lambobin sirri, sirri, da yadda ake kare kanka akan layi!

activities.title: Bayyane ko Sirri?
activities.intro: Shin wannan bayanin bayyane ne ko sirri? Yanke shawarar da sauri!

statements.label: Sirri!
statements.explanation: Kalmar shigar koyaushe sirri ce. Kada ka raba ta da kowa!

statements.label: Bayyane
statements.explanation: A makaranta kowa yana san sunanka — wannan bayanin bayyane ne.

statements.label: Sirri!
statements.explanation: Lambar PIN ɗinka asiri ne — tana kare asusun bankin ka.

statements.label: Bayyane
statements.explanation: Wurin shakatawa wuri ne na jama'a — kowa na iya zuwa.

statements.label: Sirri!
statements.explanation: Diyanrinka sirri ne — kai kaɗai ke yanke shawarar wanda zai iya karantawa.

statements.label: Bayyane
statements.explanation: Kowa zai iya ganin launin kekanka.

statements.label: Sirri!
statements.explanation: Ba ka raba adireshi da baƙi — wannan bayanin sirri ne.

statements.label: Bayyane
statements.explanation: Yanayi iri ɗaya ne ga kowa — bayyane gaba ɗaya!

statements.label: Sirri!
statements.explanation: Makullin sirri ɗinka shine mafi muhimmancin asiri. Wanda ya samu shi yana da bitcoin ɗinka!

activities.title: Lambar Sirri
activities.intro: Karya kalmomin Bitcoin na asiri da farantin lambobi!

modules.title: Al'amuran Kudi
modules.summary: Kuna iya samun kudi, ajiye shi, zuba jari, da kashe shi. Kasafin kudi zaɓi ne. Dokokin gaskiya suna da muhimmanci.
modules.description: Samun kudi, ajiyewa, zuba jari — zama masanin kudi!

activities.title: Hankali da Kudi
activities.intro: Gwada yadda kake da hankali game da al'amuran kudi!

questions.q: Menene ajiyar kudi?
options: Ajiye kudi don amfani daga baya
questions.explanation: Ajiyar kudi = adana kudi domin ka iya sayen wani abu mafi girma ko muhimmanci daga baya.

questions.q: Menene zuba jari?
options: Saka kuɗinka ko lokacinku a wani wuri domin ya fi daraja daga baya
questions.explanation: Zuba jari shine saka kuɗinka ko lokacinku a wani wuri da fatan zai fi daraja daga baya.

questions.q: Kana da harsashi 12. Tanti yana farashi 8 kuma sanda yana farashi 6. Shin zaka iya sayen dukkansu?
questions.explanation: 8 + 6 = 14, amma kana da harsashi 12 kawai. Dole ka zaɓa! Wannan yin kasafin kudi ne.

questions.q: A gwanjon sayarwa, farashi na wani kayan da ba kasafai ba yana ƙaruwa koyaushe. Me yasa?
options: Mutane da yawa suna so amma akwai ɗaya kawai (ƙaranci + buƙata)
questions.explanation: Idan mutane da yawa suna so amma kaɗan ne akwai, farashin yana ƙaruwa. Haka buƙata da samar da kayayyaki ke aiki!

questions.q: Me yasa dokokin gaskiya suna da muhimmanci game da kudi?
options: Domin kowa ya samu daidaitaccen dama
questions.explanation: Dokokin gaskiya suna tabbatar da cewa ba wanda zai iya yaudara kuma kowa yana da daidaitaccen dama.

questions.q: Menene aro?
options: Karɓar kuɗin wani da za ka biya daga baya
questions.explanation: Aro yana nufin karɓar kuɗin wani, amma dole ka biya shi daga baya — yawanci tare da ƙarin (riba).

modules.title: Asasin Bitcoin
modules.summary: Bitcoin kuɗi ne na dijital mai ƙaranci ba tare da mai tsaka-tsaki ba. Mining yana tabbatar da ma'amaloli. Satoshi ya kasance ɓoye.
modules.description: Babban cesantar Bitcoin: daga Satoshi zuwa mining!

activities.title: Wane ne Satoshi?
activities.intro: Gano tarihin da ke bayan Bitcoin!

questions.q: Wane ne ya ƙirƙiri Bitcoin?
questions.explanation: Satoshi Nakamoto ya buga 'white paper' a 2008 tare da ra'ayin Bitcoin. Ba wanda ya san wane ne Satoshi a zahiri!

questions.q: Menene 'white paper'?
options: Takarda da kake bayyana sabon ra'ayi a ciki
questions.explanation: White paper takarda ce da kake gabatar da sabon ra'ayi ko warware matsala ga duniya.

questions.q: Menene Genesis Block?
questions.explanation: A ranar 3 ga Janairun 2009 aka ƙirƙiri Genesis Block — farkon farkon katafaren a cikin blockchain na Bitcoin.

questions.q: Nawa na bitcoin za a taɓa samu?
questions.explanation: Ba za a taɓa samun bitcoin fiye da miliyan 21 ba. Wannan ƙarancin an gina shi cikin dokokin!

questions.q: Menene 'tona' a Bitcoin?
options: Amfani da kwamfutoci warware damtse don tabbatar da ma'amaloli
questions.explanation: Masu tona suna amfani da kwamfutoci don warware damtsolin lissafi. A matsayin hujjar aiki da suka yi, ana ba su damar tabbatar da ma'amaloli.

questions.q: Menene Proof of Work?
options: Hujja cewa wani ya yi ƙoƙari na gaske don samun wani abu
questions.explanation: Proof of Work = hujjar aiki. Kamar wasan kwallon: kowa yana bin dokokin iri ɗaya kuma yana da daidaitaccen dama.

questions.q: Me yasa Satoshi ya ɓace?
options: Yiwuwa don ya sa Bitcoin ya zama na kowa, ba tare da shugaba ba
questions.explanation: Ta wurin ɓacewa, Satoshi ya tabbatar da cewa Bitcoin ba na mutum ɗaya ba ne. Cibiyar sadarwa tana gudana bisa dokoki, ba bisa shugaba ba.

activities.title: Tona Bitcoin!
activities.intro: Nemo nau'i-nau'i masu kama da juna don tona katafaren — kamar masu tona na gaske!

activities.title: Warware Kalmar Bitcoin
activities.intro: Warware kalmomin Bitcoin da aka gurbata!
